reviews.review_description: Add actual movement while in the lobby, its stressful having to use up so much space just to get my gun (also give the option to switch hands when using a gun, its always locked on the one you decide to pick up). Add height calibration like they do in even night club simulator vr. Small measures but either add reminders for controls or allow custom controls, if I don't play this game for some time, I end up forgetting how to play it since it doesn't even follow the most standard shooter controls across VR.

*No particular order*
Aim Assault
Dead Second
Crisis Brigade 2

If you're looking for some good action while getting your body moving and heart pumping, this is for you. When I was playing this action-packed game, my wife and daughters laughed at me, saying I looked like I was in the middle of a war zone. A day later, my whole body felt like I had been in the gym. So get this game, have fun, and get ready to cancel your gym subscription! 😎

If you love shooting games especially ones thats not laggy or cheap looking then this gsme is for you. This gsme is awesome and very addicting. I only wish they had more levels and more guns.  I hope they make a part 2

It really needs something new to it.
Like a rogue like mode, or new levels .... even better, some multiplayer maps.
But then again.... this awesome game might be dead

Absolutely one of the BEST games on the entire META PLATFORM! My wife is NOT a gamer and HATES anything TOO physically draining.. well she played this game ONE TIME and now she finds herself all at work thinking bout this game!🤣🤣 SHE HAS PLAYED NON STOP SINCE CHRISTMAS!! SHE HAS BEEN THROUGH ENTIRE BODY SORENESS AND IS PROUDLY EXPERIENCING MUCH IMPROVED DAILY FUNCTIONALITY AND STRENGTH AND HER STAMINA AT WORK AND EVERYTHING ELSE IS THROUGH THE ROOF!! ALL FROM A LIL OLE GAME... IMAGINE THAT. WE LOVE IT! VISUALLY STUNNING, IMPECCABLE GRAPHICS! NOTHING TRASH! PURE FUN AND QUALITY!

developer_response.body:
WOW - this absolutely made our day 😄

Hearing that Dead Second hooked a non-gamer, survived the “too physically draining” test, and turned into an all-day-at-work-thinking-about-it experience is the highest compliment we could get. Please tell your wife she’s an absolute legend 💪🔥

reviews.review_title: Great game. Great value. A lot of fun.
reviews.review_description: Don't hesitate to buy this game. The movement takes a short while to get used to, but is easy to use. Good variety of weapons and maps. Fantastic sound effects. Pretty cool once you complete all levels that it allows you to continuously play through  some of the levels as one game.
Pretty awesome game except a reloading glitch where the pistol freezes as you try to rack the slide when reloading. Such a shame because the game is very fun.
Saw this on sale for $6 and wow what an awesome game to play. Yes the levels are short but just so much fun!

Firstly, its not a long game. At the price point and especially on sale definitely worth it. Honestly got slightly obsessed and beat it in two days. Replay value is high if you want to do the achievements. Its a fun shooter, reminds me of arcade light gun games.
Could use a little more content. Otherwise, it's fantastic!
Would be so good with coop

This is no longer an "App Labs" game, so why hasn't cross-buy been enabled? 
Most Quest/Rift titles are these days if they are dual listed on the store..
Had it been, I would have rated it MUCH higher.
C'mon devs...do the right thing and enable it.

>>>>>>>>UPDATE: After Dev Response...
Much appreciated that you will be enabling cross-buy now!
That is fantastic news, loving the Quest version, and am looking forward to playing the Rift/PCVR version once you update it.
Your native bHaptics support is also a VERY welcome addition!

>>>>>>>>FURTHER UPDATE : This Dev has failed to deliver any such updates to the PCVR versions on both the Oculus or Steam stores as promised.
Cross-Buy on the Quest & Rift versions still hasn't happened after their previous response.
NOT impressed!
Too bad, as it's a fun game, brought down by false promises by the Dev.

This is a very fun shooter game. It’s not too hard to get the hang of it, and progressing through the levels is challenging without being overwhelming. A fantastic value at $5.00. But once you’ve gotten through the full game a few times, you really feel the need for more challenges. Hopefully the developers don’t stop here and keep adding to this great experience.

Dear Developers!

Just purchased the game and what I have noticed that if resolution is set to 2048px on Quest 2 then the game does not start. After showing the init screen the game exits to the OS.
Colud you fix the reason behind as to play the game in higher resolution brings more immersivity and with the v83 firmware that allows positional time warp I would not expect noticeably lower frame rate.
Other than that this is the best shooter to me.

Update: just succeeded to start in 2048px... so seems after some trial or some unknown constellation the game works with this setting too. 
           Cool!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the detailed feedback! 🙏 We really appreciate you taking the time to report the resolution issue and letting us know about your experience with it. It’s great to hear that, after some trial and error, you were able to get it working at 2048px and enjoy the increased immersion.

We will keep an eye on these kinds of issues to make the experience smoother for everyone. Also.... it is awesome to hear you consider Dead Second the best shooter - that really makes our day!!! Thanks again for playing and sharing your thoughts. 🎮✨

reviews.review_description: Great game. Smooth ride! (Could use hand grenades)
When starting the game I’m stuck on the meta game loading screen

I've had this for a while now. Following the first big update, I couldn't believe how good this was for a game that flew under my radar. At first, I was a little disappointed having to teleport between the multiple shooting locations, however, this has become a big part of how I play and I have fully embraced it. Once you realise you don't need a thumbstick to move, it's more about actually moving by taking cover, getting down low and jumping up, it's absolutely amazing fun, and an amazing workout for your knees! I fully recommend this game. As long as you know this is an arcade style shooter, you can easily jump in for 5 minutes and stay for an hour. Also, I love the Halloween update. It was a fun and unexpected suprise.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive feedback, please join us on our Discord Channel to discuss the future of Dead Second and new features and updates https://discord.gg/9MzYaTTH

reviews.review_description:
I love this game played it through most levels. With one exception in the supposed endless level I got stuck in an alley with no one coming and no way out I had to force quit the game
Hence the 4 stars

developer_response.body:
Sorry about that hiccup in the endless level - getting stuck with no way out is definitely not the experience we want anyone to have. We really appreciate you flagging it, as reports like this help us track down edge cases and improve stability.

Thank-you again for playing and for the honest feedback - it genuinely helps us make the game better. 💙

reviews.review_description: If you were looking for that 'Time Crisis in VR', look no further than this. There are few other good games with similar gameplay, but I believe this one tops them all.
Another fantastic lightgun like game.

reviews.review_title: Just amazing, best game in this genre!
reviews.review_description: Really hope there will be DLC's or a second part!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! 🙌 We’re thrilled you’re enjoying Dead Second! We shall let the developer team know. . Thanks for playing and for the support!

reviews.review_title: Can't use Ace XR handset, HELP!!
reviews.review_description: I got this game because I was looking for a more interactive game experience using the ACE XR handset. I read online that this game would be best. I managed to get the controller axis adjusted to fit the ACE handset, but it wouldn’t register the trigger pulls. I adjusted the trigger setting to no avail. I’d love some developer or community help with this. Thanks.

I’ve tried many shooters on the Quest 3, and this is one of my absolute favourites. It’s simple enough to get started, and a great, entertaining way to keep practicing aim, movement, and reflexes. I’ll be the first to sign up for Dead Second 2. 5/5!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback please join us on Discord to hear about future plans and have a say in the things we bring to the game moving forward. https://discord.gg/M6rzkJb2

reviews.review_description: This game is really good. The graphics are good and the mechanics and the gameplay. Plus a bargain at the price it is.
This is easily my favourite game on Quest 3. Loved the Halloween update as well and the new selection of weapons.
Very playable game only been on it once at the moment if your like anything like me that likes shooter games this is a must have.

Really enjoying playing it and working to get more guns and complete the harder levels. I guess I'm a bit dumb but I keep accidently buying sights for the wrong gun, there goes $20K on that laser sight :-)

A money/scoring FAQ would be good to know how to maximise a run

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive feedback, glad you enjoy the game, Join us on our discord channel to join the discussion and to hear all about upcoming features, and our future plans https://discord.gg/FFfzk9Wb

reviews.review_description: This reminds me very much of Zombieland, and I love Zombieland! I can't believe it's this cheap! Amazing value for money and I'll be playing this a lot!! :-)

The shooting range menu is limited, but you can experience truly excellent shooting practice.

However, I have one complaint.
While you can adjust trigger sensitivity in the settings, the sensitivity of the Meta Quest 3 controller triggers remained unchanged.

Adjusting trigger sensitivity is necessary to play with a 3D-printed gun controller, so please make it adjustable. I kindly request this.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback please join us on our Discord Channel to provide further feedback on the game https://discord.gg/9MzYaTTH

reviews.review_description:
Fun, challenging with someone nice weapons too. As long as you remember this is an arcade shooter and therefore your mobility is limited and mechanical, you should love the game.

My issue is it's been locking and freezing up when I log in. I'm playing on standalone Quest 3. The game has locked up my entire game and rendered it unplayable.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive feedback, glad you enjoy the game, Join us on our discord channel to join the discussion and to hear all about upcoming features, and our future plans https://discord.gg/FFfzk9Wb   Please not the game is not compatible with Quest Games Optimizer please turn that off and the freezing issues should go away

reviews.review_description: Dead Second is a near-perfect arcade shooter, delivering exhilarating Time Crisis action with a brilliant 'bullet time' mechanic. It  feel like an absolute action hero, weaving through bullets and scoring satisfying headshots

reviews.review_title: Almost a great game for the Ace VR gun
reviews.review_description:
I got this game because it’s one of the few games that will allow you to mess with the pitch and roll of the controller as well trigger setting. This makes it possible to use with ACE VR handset….. with some modifications. 

Go to settings, controls, and on the right there’s a button for adjust. I set my pitch for -130 and roll for -160. On the game setting at the bottom there is a trigger setting and I have it set for .20. Now that only get you part of the way there to being able to use the ACE VR handset. I had to add around1/4 of Eva form to the lever that raises and touches the trigger on the quest controller to make the in game gun fire. Everything in game worked great after that. BUT once you exit the game or go to the navigation screen having the trigger raised that tiny amount doesn’t allow the a or b button to work so you won’t be able to select any outside of Dead Second with the controller in the handset. Additionally won’t select or start a drill in ACE VR with the form on the trigger interface lever on the handset. 

Aside from using me wishing that there was just some more adjustments with the trigger setting. The game is pretty good. Comparing it to Crisis Brigade 2 there are some pros and cons for myself. 

Pros:
-enemies take more than one shot to kill them. 
-There is a button to release the slide instead of always having to mess the slide on the gun. 
-There are additional cover spots for every fight. 


Cons:
-So far there has not been much depth in gameplay. No bosses that I’ve encountered yet. No quick time dodging sequence. No change in the bad guys. 
-The cover is pretty basic. Dumpster, Jersey barriers, and stacks of boxes. There’s hardly any point where you need to look for holes to shoot through. Mainly kneeling down or stand up. 
-Changing cover positions can be disorienting. I’ll be looking to the left change position and then have to reorient myself to where the new positions forward is. 

Wishlist:
- additional trigger adjustments so I could play with the ACE VR handset and not have to add form. Making it where the gun will fire when the controllers trigger is barely pressed. 
- More options for the semi automatic pistol. Something with 15-18 rounds. Different style of sights like the piranha. 
- A mixed reality mode where the cover is in the room with me and all the shooting is happening towards a designated wall or 180-225 degree view.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback, glad you are enjoying the game, Join us on our discord channel to join the discussion and to hear all about upcoming features, and our future plans https://discord.gg/FFfzk9Wb

reviews.review_description: I bought dead second love it game play is fun  very enjoyable experience but the game needs more levels 8 just isn't enough. For the price.  Game is very well done.  Throw on some 80s action movie soundtracks or play your own. Turn in game music down. And You'll start to really have a blast

developer_response.body: Hey jdiceman24, thanks so much for the review and for checking out Dead Second! We've heard the feedback from many players that they want more gameplay, so our team have been working hard recently on more content. If you want to find out what's being added, you can chat with our team over on the Dead Second Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed it, it was a good workout, I recommend it to everyone.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, I am glad you are enjoying the game.  Join us on discord https://discord.gg/M6rzkJb2 to hear about future updates and to give us your feedback

reviews.review_title: I am John Wick and Neo.
reviews.review_description:
Absolutely brilliant VR shooter that is so atmospheric that you almost feel like you're there and blasting away at anything that moves never gets old. The gun sound, accuracy, and look of the guns is quite simply amazing.
Now all we need now is a story mode like the old arcade light gun games lol.

developer_response.body:
Hey Stanwars, thanks so much for playing Dead Second and leaving such an awesome review! As a small indie team, the support means a lot.

We're currently working on a free new Halloween update which launches next month. If you want to chat more about it with other players and our team, it would be great to see you on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description:
This game is amazing!! I mean I'm not too pleased that you can't adjust your height in the game, but that's the only flaw tbh.

The guns feel and sound great! The accuracy of your shot is awesome and I just love the game.

Its not a free moving run around shooter, there are dedicated teleport spots you can move between but man oh man it's ta great shooter. Even with no story to it, just a great fun game.

reviews.review_title: Great game, but more content please!
reviews.review_description:
"Dead Second VR is an incredibly fun and polished arcade-style shooter that nails the feeling of being in the middle of a cinematic firefight. The fast-paced cover mechanics, slow-motion bullet dodging, and responsive controls make it one of the most satisfying VR shooters I've played. Every time I jump into a level, I feel like I'm starring in an action movie.

That said, after playing through the available content multiple times, I can’t help but wish for more — more variety, more options, and more ways to challenge myself. Specifically, I think the game would benefit a lot from additional levels and more types of handguns.

The current levels are well-designed, but expanding the environments would add freshness and replayability. Levels with different settings — such as nighttime scenes, rooftops, industrial zones, or underground areas — could introduce new tactical elements and visual diversity. Even just small changes in layout or atmosphere could make each run feel unique.

As for handguns, while the current weapons are functional and satisfying, having more variety in handgun types would greatly deepen the combat. Even without naming specific models, adding pistols that differ in handling, reload speed, recoil, or fire rate would allow players to adapt their loadouts to their playstyle and keep the action feeling fresh.

Dead Second has a strong foundation and is already a blast to play. With more levels and a wider selection of handguns, it could become one of the standout titles in the VR shooter genre. I’m excited to see how this game continues to grow — it definitely has the potential to become something truly amazing!"

developer_response.body:
Hey L8273, thanks so much for leaving such a detailed review and for playing Dead Second. Your support means a lot!

Definitely sounds like our game resonated with you. We wanted to capture that classic feeling of playing an arcade shooter, while making it as approachable as possible for both new players and VR veterans.

We are currently working on adding more content to the game, with a Halloween update on the way, which will be available in October. We're also experimenting with an endless challenge mode, which hopefully we can add to the game soon.

We'd love to chat with you more and get your thoughts on what you'd like to see added to Dead Second. Please join our Discord server - would be great to hear from you: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description:
I had such a blast with this game! It’s an awesome mix of target shooting and Pistol Whip style action. The visuals are beautiful, and enemies react in satisfying ways when taken down. The unlockable guns and extras are also very well done and add replayability. The gameplay feels smooth and rewarding, and the overall presentation is fantastic.
My only gripe—and the reason for a 4-star rating is that it’s just too short. You’re encouraged to speed through levels, which is fun, but with only eight of them, it leaves you wanting more. I really hope the developers expand on this game with additional levels or content, because what’s here is flippin great.

developer_response.body:
Hey FoamyMouthDog, thanks so much for playing Dead Second and taking the time to leave a great review. We really appreciate it!

Definitely sounds like the game hit the spot for you as an arcade shooter - we wanted to make the experience as satisfying and fun as possible. And honestly, the fact you think it's too short and want more just proves how much you enjoyed it! We'll definitely have more content on the way, so stay tuned.

Thanks for joining our Discord too. Chat with you there!

reviews.review_description: Still the Best Arcade Shooter available on quest. 🥇 Captures the retro vibes while being completely modernized. You made a great spiritual successor to Time Crisis. Now please make spiritual successor to Carnevil.

developer_response.body:
That's what we like to hear - thanks so much for the awesome review IndiGhost199X! Definitely sounds like Dead Second was the perfect arcade hit you needed for your Quest. Glad we could capture that for you.

We'll have more content on the way, including a Halloween update launching this October. If you want to find out first, it would be great to see you on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Thanks again for playing and for leaving a 5-star review!

reviews.review_description:
This is one Amazing, Fantastic, Enjoyable game. The accuracy and quick response of moving and shooting is wicked pissah. I think its the closest action game to the OG time crisis that i played in the acarde as an early teen. Well worth the $$, the replay value is great. I am constantly replaying levels to get a better time. 
For the developers, please make sequel, add more levels, and weapons.
I love this game.

developer_response.body:
Hey Slacker, thanks so much for playing Dead Second and leaving such an awesome 5-star review! This means a lot and makes a difference to small indie devs.

Great to hear just how much you enjoyed playing - we really wanted to capture that classic arcade experience, while making sure it was easy to play for all players. And we're actually working on some new content right now for a Halloween update!

Would be great to chat more and hear what you'd like to see more of - hope to see you on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description: second we need

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback please join us on Discord to hear about and influence teh future direction of Dead Second

reviews.review_description: Add rifles

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback please join us on discord https://discord.gg/9MzYaTTH to hear about our plans for future updates and features

reviews.review_description: I love this game! The variety of assignments are great. Getting better with the headshots. I'm glad my buddy recommended this game to me.

developer_response.body:
We are so glad you’re loving Dead Second! 
Thank you for playing and sharing the love! Keep having fun out there! 🔫💥

reviews.review_description: Amazing shooting game it’s amazing on quest 2 I love the graphics it’s really fun

developer_response.body: Great to hear you are enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: Best game I've played in ages, and it cost less than a fiver and was released years ago!

developer_response.body:
We are a little late in our response  - but we just wanted to say thank-you! 
We are thrilled to hear Dead Second still feels fresh and fun for you. Thank-you for playing!

reviews.review_description:
I was very disappointed to find there is no accessibility option, I have a severe spinal injury so cannot stand for more than about 30 seconds, please consider those who are not able to stand as we like playing games too
Luv the game concept though

developer_response.body:
Hey NumptyNinja, thank you for playing Dead Second and taking the time to leave your feedback. Making games more accessible to more players is super important and we're sorry to hear that Dead Second isn't as accessible as it could be. 

I will pass this onto the team, as if there's enough demand, we could potentially look at incorporating a seated option. If you'd like to pass on more thoughts or advice, please feel free to chat with us on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_title: This game flew under my radar.
reviews.review_description: I don't know how I missed this game, it totally flew under my radar. It's pretty much Time Crisis in VR and it's loads of fun. I haven't been able to stop playing or thinking about this game for the past several days because the game play loop is so addicting. Everything about the game is so polished, you can tell a lot of TLC went into making this. There are a lot of achievements and leaderboards to chase after with several different categories. Loads of different guns, skins, and gloves you can unlock that will keep you coming back. This is a great title to showcase VR because it's relatively easy to learn, won't cause motion sickness, and is pretty immersive. Do yourself a favor and buy this game.

developer_response.body:
Hey Teeepee, thanks so much for checking out Dead Second and taking the time to leave us a great review for the game! We really do appreciate it. :)

Time Crisis in VR is exactly the vibe we were going for. We wanted players to be able to pick up and play right away with simple controls and fun gameplay - sounds like we were able to nail that for you!

Your support means a lot. If you'd like to speak with the team behind the game, please consider joining our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Hope to see you there and thanks again for the 5-star review!

reviews.review_description: I bought this as it was recommended on the FB MQ promotions give aways group. I'm not too disappointed but I have seen similar type games with very similar graphics. Not ground breaking but perfectly acceptable as a shoot-out game and for the price who can complain. I was hoping for something I hadn't seen before but from what I've played on the limited amount of levels maybe I'll be surprised

reviews.review_title: Oh, This is a Great Time!
reviews.review_description: If you're looking for a way to relieve some stress at the end of the day and you want to feel like John Wick, then this game is for you. The gun mechanics feel great and there's difficulty options for any type of gamer. The graphics and levels are awesome and fit perfectly within the tone of the game. For the price, it's well worth every penny.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive feedback, glad you enjoy the game, Join us on our discord channel to join the discussion and to hear all about upcoming features, and our future plans https://discord.gg/FFfzk9Wb

reviews.review_description:
Forget time crisis. This game is way
 bettet than that.  Buy this game and you will find out.  Lots of guns and goons just the way we like it.

developer_response.body:
Now that's a review! We love Time Crisis and any comparison to such an arcade classic is always satisfying. But to be called better than Time Crisis!? That's an insane compliment.

We'd love to hear why you enjoy Dead Second so much - jump on our Discord and let us know: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Thanks so much for playing and for your review!

reviews.review_description:
Suit up, agent — time is literally on your side.
Gameplay is snappy, intuitive, and ridiculously satisfying. Every enemy you drop slows time for a beat — just long enough to dodge a bullet, line up a headshot, and keep your combo going. Nail enough targets in quick succession and you’ll hit that sweet Temporal Overdrive mode where you become a one-person highlight reel of carnage and cool.

If Superhot and Equilibrium had a VR lovechild raised on energy drinks and alien tech — it’d be Dead Second. Get in, slow time, shoot fast, and don’t look back.

I highly recommend this game. I haven't played in 3 years, and the graphics look amazing! It's fun... and keeps you on your toes. Just don't fall over while crouched lol. Don't be like me.

developer_response.body:
Hey TheGamingVeteran, thanks so much for playing Dead Second and jumping back into the game again! 

It's awesome to hear how much players love arcade shooters in VR. Many of our team loved playing classic arcade games like Time Crisis, and wanted to recreate that same feeling in Dead Second.

Feel free to jump on our Discord and share your thoughts - we'd love to see you there: https://discord.gg/JPAgPApT

reviews.review_description: Simple and satisfying. Guns feel great and sound good.  Definitely recommend.

Played crisis brigade, loved it. Played this and it is top notch. Smooth, high octance and pure fun.
Great

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive feedback, glad you enjoy the game, Join us on our discord channel to join the discussion and to hear all about upcoming features, and our future plans https://discord.gg/FFfzk9Wb

reviews.review_description: Just pure classic shooting fun. Kind of reminds me of when games were just about pure fun. Levels are fun to shoot through. Controls are solid but forgiving, as this is not a pinpoint type of shooting game. Kind of reminds me of old school Golden Eye in some ways. Not the longest game, but I always have fun when I play this game. You teleport to move forward, which after a few minutes becomes very natural and does not give me any motion sickness. The game can be semi challenging on the harder settings, but by no means a crazy hard game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the awesome review, Witwicky!

We're thrilled to hear that Dead Second brings back that pure, classic fun for you—GoldenEye vibes are a huge compliment! Glad to hear the controls feel solid and natural, and that the challenge level hits the sweet spot.

If you ever want to chat with fellow players or share your best runs, we'd love to have you in our Discord! Join us here: discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

See you there! 🔫😃

reviews.review_description: This game reminds me a lot of Crisis Brigade. It's got the same style of gameplay where you tp to fixed point behind cover and shoot the bad guys. Co-op would have been nice. You're not gonna spend 50 hours playing this game, but if you're looking for a fun shooter that's not expensive, easy to get into, and won't make you sick, this is a good choice.

developer_response.body:
Hey Dave, thanks so much for playing Dead Second and taking time to leave a review! We really appreciated it.

Glad to hear you really enjoyed it. We definitely wanted it to be a short and snappy VR shooter that pretty much anyone could easily pick up and play. Sounds like it hit the mark!

If you have suggestions or feedback, we'd love to chat more about it on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/38TY7SVq43

Thanks again!

reviews.review_title: Perfect for fans of John Woo-films
reviews.review_description: I've tested a few shooters recently. This game is definitely the best option if you want to do a bit of John Woo or John Wick. An arcade shooter that you can quickly find your way around, the shooting is extremely fun. The graphics are decent, almost nothing flickers, the animations are fluid, the ragdoll physics are great. It's also nice that the enemies you kill don't all disappear after seconds. Since you "beam" yourself from one shooting position to the other, there is no motion sickness.  The only drawback: With 8 levels and three levels of difficulty, the game is a little short, and there isn't too much to unlock. But that doesn't change the fact that the game is definitely worth the money. I'm currently playing through it for the second time.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the fantastic review, M0NTANA666! We love that Dead Second gives you those John Woo and John Wick vibes. That’s exactly the kind of high-energy, cinematic action we aimed to create!

We totally understand that 8 levels and the current unlockables might leave you wanting more. And that's a good thing! Player feedback is incredibly important to us, and we’re always thinking about ways to expand the experience - hopefully we will have more to share with you soon.

If you have any ideas about what you'd like to see for future content, drop by our Discord community: discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS 🔫

See you there!

reviews.review_description: This is the type of shooting game I was looking for on vr. Completed all levels on easy difficulty now enjoying normal difficulty. I definitely recommend. Looking forward to part 2! Could use more levels, guns and a co-op mode.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the 5 stars, ArtisF! We're so glad Dead Second is your go-to VR shooter!

Huge props for completing all the levels on easy—good luck on normal difficulty! 😎 We hear you on wanting more levels, guns, and co-op, and we appreciate the feedback.

If you’d like to chat about the game and share ideas with the community, come join us on Discord! discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description: I was lucky enough to be an early adopter of this - I loved the early build on applab and it's great to see it mature into an even better game now. If you like things like Drop Deal Dual Strike, or have ever played House of the Dead, Time Crisis, Virtua Cop, you'll love this. One of my must-have Quest games.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sticking with Dead Second from the early days, DaveSkywalker!

It’s awesome to hear you’ve enjoyed watching it evolve. We love those classic lightgun arcade shooters as much as you and they've been a huge inspiration for Dead Second.

If you ever want to chat about the game or share your best runs, come join us on Discord! discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description: Was looking for a fun virual cop like shooter, and i found it. Just good fun, like the pasing and gun mechanics. Well done

developer_response.body:
Hey AReinhard1943, thanks so much for playing Dead Second and leaving us such a great 5-star review. We really appreciate it!

Would be awesome to chat with you more about what you like about the game. If you're interested, please join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_title: Absolutely one of my favorite games!!!
reviews.review_description: So much fun being John Wick in this arcade style shooter but so much more. A perfect blend of action, achievements and goals that makes you not want to stop!  The AI is just enough to make you have to work at winning and the design of this game leaves you feeling satisfied every time. You get money for winning and achievements allowing you to purchase more and more amazing guns that will keep you blazing with all the pizzazz of any action movie from John Wick to  Robocop! I have a ton of shooters but this will surely go down as one of my favorite games of all time and at only $15!!! Just buy it!!!!

developer_response.body:
Wow, MCreager, this review made our day!

We love that Dead Second gives you that full-on action movie experience—John Wick is exactly the kind of energy we’re going for! It’s awesome to hear that the AI keeps things challenging while still feeling rewarding, and that the weapon progression keeps you coming back for more.

Thanks for the amazing support! If you ever want to chat more, please join our Discord: discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS 

Hope to see you there! 😎

reviews.review_description: As a person with a partial impairment, I can only play with one hand, and this game is perfect for that!  It's easy to progress through the different stages. I appreciate how the teleportation differs from other games; it keeps me engaged. I love the game's simplicity: shoot ducks, dodge bullets, and clear stages.  Buying new weapons is a fun feature. I wish there were more weapon varieties.  I highly recommend it!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review!

We're really happy to hear that Dead Second works well for you and provides an enjoyable experience with one-handed play. Accessibility is something we care about, and it's great to know that the teleportation system works quite well too.

If you ever want to share more feedback or chat with the community, we’d love to have you in our Discord: discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Thanks again for your support and taking the time to leave a 5 star review!

reviews.review_description: More levels please

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the 5 stars, Ianfuller60! 🔥 More levels is a request we hear loud and clear—hopefully we can help. 😉

In the meantime, come hang out with us on Discord! discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description: But... can we expect more content? Weapons, levels and maybe neverendless mode?

developer_response.body:
Hey Mazur! Thanks so much for playing Dead Second and leaving a 5-star review. We really appreciate it! With enough support for the game, we certainly hope to offer new content to keep you coming back for more. 

If you have any feedback or suggestions on what you'd like to see in Dead Second, please let us know on Discord! Pretty sure you've joined already, so we're happy to chat anytime and hear your thoughts. :)

reviews.review_title: This is the VR shooter I was looking for
reviews.review_description:
It's beautiful in its simplicity.  The maps are thoughtful without being cluttered, and the guns are very satisfying.
I think dual wielding could use some work in that it's probably _too_ realistic when it comes to reloading.  If the hotspots for holster and magazine weren't so tight that might be easier to manage.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the great review, FancyPants24! We're glad Dead Second delivered the VR shooter experience you were looking for! 

Keeping the maps clean yet engaging and making the gunplay satisfying were big goals for us. We also appreciate your feedback on dual wielding and reloading - smoother handling is definitely something we’ll take into consideration.

If you’d like to discuss ideas or share more feedback, join us on Discord: discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Thanks again for the 5-star review!

reviews.review_description: Love the accuracy of the aiming. I love the game, but I do see a lot of room for improvement. I'd love to see John Woo style double pistol action.

developer_response.body:
Glad you're loving the aiming in Dead Second, TortugaXXX! Precision is key in a shooter, and it’s awesome to hear it feels spot on for you. 

Not sure if you found it, but in the shop you can upgrade each gun to a dual-wield mode. Two pistols is way better than one!

We’re always looking for great feedback, so come share your thoughts with us on Discord: discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description: It's good but you should make a mode note the hitman games freelancer or a mode like hard bullets ride

developer_response.body:
Hey Klind, thanks so much for checking out Dead Second and for taking the time to leave a review. Glad to hear you enjoyed playing!

If you want to give more feedback about the game and help us shape future updates so we can find that something we're missing, please join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Hope to hear from you!

reviews.review_description: Maybe the best fps for vr. Waiting for part two.

Thanks for the awesome review, Daniel! That's a huge compliment—we really appreciate it! 🙌

Come join the community on Discord - we'd love to hear what you'd hope to see in part two: discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description: Great game, please keep adding more content. You guys have a winner if you do!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the kind words, biggoobs! We're glad you're enjoying Dead Second, and we hear you, more content would be awesome.

Stay tuned, and in the meantime, come chat with us and share your thoughts on Discord: discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description: this game is Wow wow wow wow wow wow andWOW... not a big fan of shooter games but thanks to this game, now i AM😁😁😁😁.its a straight up best shooting shooting game on quest 2....BEST

I have to say this is one of my favourite VR games ever. I would love to see more levels, though, but for the price, I think the levels that are included are extremely fair for the price. I, for one, would be very happy to pay for extra levels as the price is so low as it stands.

⚡About Dead Second & 1/4 PRICE OFF⚡

Dead Second on Meta Quest is undoubtedly the worthy successor to Time Crisis, redefining the shooter genre in virtual reality. From the moment you put on the headset, you're immediately immersed in a captivating universe that evokes the best moments of Time Crisis but with a modernity and immersion that propel it to a whole new level.

The graphics of Dead Second are exceptionally high quality, far surpassing those of its predecessors. Every texture is detailed, and each environment is carefully designed to offer an impressive visual experience. The fluidity of movements and the precision of controls make every interaction feel natural and intuitive, recalling the mastery that Time Crisis once provided but with enhanced sophistication.

The gameplay of Dead Second is a perfect blend of nostalgia and innovation. The shooting mechanics, already excellent in Time Crisis, are further refined here with responsive controls and increased accuracy. The missions are varied and challenging, requiring players to be quick, strategic, and precise, while introducing modern tactical elements. The enemies, equipped with advanced AI, adapt their behaviors, making each encounter unique and thrilling.

The sound immersion is equally impressive. The dynamic soundtrack and precise sound effects create an intense atmosphere that perfectly accompanies the action, reminiscent of the most memorable moments of Time Crisis while adding new depth to the gaming experience.

The developers' commitment to the community is also noteworthy. By listening to player feedback and providing regular updates, they ensure the game continuously evolves and stays fresh. This positive interaction with the community creates a welcoming and active dynamic, further enhancing Dead Second's appeal.

In summary, Dead Second on Meta Quest is not just a tribute to Time Crisis but a natural and improved evolution of this classic. It captures the essence of what made Time Crisis special while adding innovations that fully exploit the capabilities of modern virtual reality. Whether you're a nostalgic fan of Time Crisis or new to the genre, Dead Second is a must-play, offering an immersive, intense, and unmatched gaming experience. It sets the new standard for VR shooters and is a must-have for all Meta Quest owners.

Was this helpful?
If so, plz press the 👍 button.

Hi devs, I like your game and it's a truly good run for the money. Very good, if it would work. Out of nowhere the game stopped running and crashes right at start. Have to hard reset the quest everytime. I found that reinstalling it solves the problem but all the stats and equipment goes away. Not a good solution. Please fix this.

PS. I have the latest version, it's still not working.

developer_response.body: Thanks for reaching out, we have patched the game to Version 0.91 so ensure you are on that version.  If you are still having issues please join us on our Discord Support page https://discord.gg/4fjRB2ya or update us here.

reviews.review_description: Ok game for the price, not a bad value at all for "non gamers" a bit like Gunclub, but with less cool gear and options. Could be a good game if only we could move, that "fake arcade" lazy developers shortcut is frustrating as  a mainly VR gamer. It could have been a great little game instead of feeling like a "mobile game port". I just finished the Demo for Metal:Hellsinger VR on pc and those guys literally did a port but they got crazy and made it possible to walk ! Unbelievable groundbreaking stuff... had 3x more fun on the demo compared to 2 hours of static arcade

WAY too short. All 8 levels, all 3 difficulty levels in 2 hours, easy.
To the developers: I'm sorry but, were you actually trying to guilt me into changing my rating? That's petty and weak. Don't worry about me giving an HONEST rating to any future games you make because, I won't be buying them.
Btw, adding some unnecessary drones and making the game shinier isn't adding to it...same thing goes for the convoluted, stolen plot.

developer_response.body: We're sorry you feel you are not getting enough value from the game, we feel it is priced very fairly compared to other products but we appreciate your feedback. We are hoping that the revenue from the store release will allow use to expand the game significantly and all future updates will also be free.

reviews.review_description:
PLEASE ADD PRO TUBE SUPPORT BACK INTO
 THE GAME

Very much a 90s style arcade lightgun game. Fast paced but not tiring. Can jump in and shoot through a quick few levels when you want to kill half hour. I usually hate games where you have to teleport from spot to spot but it works really well here, going from one point to another to flank a bad guy. Great visuals and gameplay. 
For the low price, I think this is well worth the money and I cant wait to see what gets added along the way.

reviews.review_title: This is what a VR Game should Look like
reviews.review_description: Great game, that's are a VR Game should be. Ist a great game and a lot of fun. Great graphics. The only Problem i habe is, if i play Level 1 easy mode, for example, and i play a second round and the score a netter than the first round the high score is not displayed in the rank list although it is better than the first. Only the one from the first round Show up.
Great game, highly recommend

If you liked Gun games such as Time Crisis, Virtua Cop etc  you will LOVE this game. Its very immersive & Just needs a few more Different Characters, (Sizes, Body types & not ALL Criminals are male right), Add some End Level Bosses/Challenges etc maybe some collapsible structures that can kill criminals too with a well aimed shot? That said, , i enjoyed it enough that i still bought it and play it heaps. https://youtu.be/KZEQxrE6XUg
